name: @appstrate/mitm-test
description: Phase 1.5 reference — exercises the sidecar's HTTPS MITM proxy + per-request credential injection on a `delivery.http` api_key auth. The integration's MCP server calls https://api.test.appstrate.dev/echo and reports back what header reached upstream. Used by the Phase 1.5 E2E to confirm transparent credential injection without the integration ever reading the API key itself.
author: Appstrate

apiKey.description: Test API key — any non-empty string. The integration never sees this value; the sidecar's MITM proxy injects it as `X-Mitm-Test-Token` on every upstream call.
